summary: Successfully rebuilt test page (ID 136) to match the new test page design pattern. Updated page title to 'TEST: Dynamic Content Carousel', deleted all existing content (10 bare blocks), and rebuilt with all 12 variations properly wrapped in DemoContainer blocks with descriptive titles and descriptions. Added 2 missing variations (Loop Mode and Loop + Autoplay) that TestimonialsCarousel test page has. No code changes were needed to block files - the padding implementation is already correct and matches TestimonialsCarousel perfectly. Block count verification confirms exactly 12 takt/dynamic-content-carousel blocks, all properly nested within takt/demo-container wrappers.
nextSteps: QA team should take screenshots at all breakpoints to verify DemoContainer rendering and spacing
Test new Loop Mode and Loop + Autoplay variations for functionality
Run taktician_a11y_test with carousel pattern on the Loop + Autoplay variation to verify autoplay accessibility controls
